framework: Matched-false-alarm calibration with a label-permutation significance test (exchangeability null), after Boettiger & Hastings 2012, J. R. Soc. Interface 9:2527.
disclaimer: This audit record measures a detector's event-vs-null skill on the supplied corpus only: the matched-false-alarm threshold, the rate it achieved, the event detection rate, and the permutation p-value of the event alarm count. It is not a certification of field performance and does not transfer to any other corpus, detector configuration, or deployment; a low p-value means the events alarmed more than the matched false alarm on this corpus, nothing more.
